title: Adventure Swords CIT
description: CIT Pack featuring swords from Adventure Time!
body:
![a golden sword behind a blocy red text that reads "Adventure Swords"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2010510b356e22c26809fe4e1f0bfa068eb23f86.png)

Adventure Swords is a resource pack that allows you to change any sword to one of 5 swords from the cartoon Adventure Time!

### **How to use:**

**____________________________________________________________________________________________________________**

Simply have any mod that supports CIT, and rename any sword on the anvil with the names of the swords from the resource pack!
